Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class CareBenefitVerifySettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.CareBenefitVerifySettings
public class CareBenefitVerifySettings extends Metadata

Java class for CareBenefitVerifySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CareBenefitVerifySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="codeSetType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultNpi" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="generalPlanServiceTypeCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="organizationName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="serviceApexClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="serviceNamedCredential" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="serviceTypeSourceSystem" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="uriPath" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
